title: SQL Joins Cheat Sheet
description: Quick reference for SQL join operations and syntax.

commands.command: SELECT * FROM table1 INNER JOIN table2 ON table1.id = table2.id;
commands.description: Select records with matching values in both tables.
commands.scenario: Select records with matching values in both tables.

commands.command: SELECT * FROM table1 INNER JOIN table2 ON table1.id = table2.id WHERE table1.status = 'active';
SELECT a.name, b.salary FROM employees AS a INNER JOIN salaries AS b ON a.id = b.employee_id;
commands.description: Using aliases in an inner join.
commands.scenario: Using aliases in an inner join.

commands.command: SELECT * FROM table1 LEFT JOIN table2 ON table1.id = table2.id;
commands.description: Select all records from the left table and matched records from the right table.
commands.scenario: Select all records from the left table and matched records from the right table.

commands.command: SELECT * FROM table1 LEFT JOIN table2 ON table1.id = table2.id WHERE table2.status IS NULL;
commands.description: Left join with a condition on the right table.
commands.scenario: Left join with a condition on the right table.

commands.command: SELECT * FROM table1 LEFT JOIN table2 ON table1.id = table2.id WHERE table2.id IS NULL;
commands.description: Using left join to find unmatched records.
commands.scenario: Using left join to find unmatched records.

commands.command: SELECT * FROM table1 RIGHT JOIN table2 ON table1.id = table2.id;
commands.description: Select all records from the right table and matched records from the left table.
commands.scenario: Select all records from the right table and matched records from the left table.

commands.command: SELECT * FROM table1 RIGHT JOIN table2 ON table1.id = table2.id WHERE table1.status IS NULL;
commands.description: Right join with a condition on the left table.
commands.scenario: Right join with a condition on the left table.

commands.command: SELECT * FROM table1 RIGHT JOIN table2 ON table1.id = table2.id WHERE table1.id IS NULL;
commands.description: Using right join to find unmatched records.
commands.scenario: Using right join to find unmatched records.

commands.command: SELECT * FROM table1 FULL OUTER JOIN table2 ON table1.id = table2.id;
commands.description: Select all records when there is a match in either left or right table records.
commands.scenario: Select all records when there is a match in either left or right table records.

commands.command: SELECT * FROM table1 FULL OUTER JOIN table2 ON table1.id = table2.id WHERE table1.id IS NULL OR table2.id IS NULL;
commands.description: Full outer join to find all unmatched records.
commands.scenario: Full outer join to find all unmatched records.

commands.command: SELECT * FROM table1 FULL OUTER JOIN table2 ON table1.id = table2.id WHERE table1.status = 'active' OR table2.status = 'active';
commands.description: Full outer join with additional filtering conditions.
commands.scenario: Full outer join with additional filtering conditions.
